metadataAttributes.title: 선박설비기준 별표 21의2 - 총톤수 3,000톤 이상 선박의 계류설비 등의 요건
metadataAttributes.approvalBasis: AE-Sentinel project-owner request; current official Korean rule and attached PDF verified
metadataAttributes.applicability: Directly applies to ships of 3,000 gross tonnage and above under the cited standard; use only as a conservative general safety reference for other ships, and prioritize approved site procedures
